tasks.name: Environment Setup
tasks.description: Install SAELens, SAEBench, sae-spelling, transformer-lens, and dependencies. Verify GPU availability and model download.

tasks.name: Pilot: Absorption Detection (Gemma-2-2B, Layer 8, 16K)
tasks.description: Detect absorption for first-letter features (A-Z) on Gemma-2-2B layer 8, 16K dict. Run Chanin metric via SAEBench. Record absorption rates per feature.

pilot.pass_criteria: At least 10 features with absorption rate > 10% detected; metric computation completes without error

tasks.name: Pilot: Feature Steering (Layer 8, 16K)
tasks.description: Steer first-letter features at strengths [1.0, 2.0, 5.0, 10.0]. Measure target-letter token probability increase. Include random feature baseline and null steering control.

pilot.pass_criteria: Random baseline steering success < 15%; At least 5 first-letter features show >30% steering success; computation completes within timeout

visualizations.description: Absorption rate vs. steering success rate

tasks.name: Pilot: Sparse Probing (Layer 8, 16K)
tasks.description: Train k-sparse linear probes (k=1, 5, 10) on first-letter classification. Measure F1 using only main feature latents vs. all latents. Compare absorbed vs. non-absorbed.

pilot.pass_criteria: Full-latent probing F1 > 0.6; k=1 sparse probing F1 > 0.3; computation completes within timeout

visualizations.description: Absorption rate vs. probing F1 degradation

tasks.name: Pilot: Correlation Analysis
tasks.description: Compute Pearson/Spearman correlation between absorption rate and steering success / probing F1. Fit linear model. Test shuffled label control.

pilot.pass_criteria: Shuffled control correlation |r| < 0.15; Analysis script runs without error

tasks.name: Full: Absorption Detection (Layer 12, 16K + 65K)
tasks.description: Detect absorption for first-letter features on Gemma-2-2B layer 12, both 16K and 65K dictionary sizes.

tasks.name: Full: Absorption Detection (Layer 16, 16K + 65K)
tasks.description: Detect absorption for first-letter features on Gemma-2-2B layer 16, both 16K and 65K dictionary sizes.

tasks.name: Full: Feature Steering (Layer 12, 16K + 65K)
tasks.description: Steer first-letter features on layer 12 at multiple strengths. Include random baseline and null control.

tasks.name: Full: Feature Steering (Layer 16, 16K + 65K)
tasks.description: Steer first-letter features on layer 16 at multiple strengths. Include random baseline and null control.

tasks.name: Full: Sparse Probing (Layer 12, 16K + 65K)
tasks.description: Train k-sparse probes on layer 12 first-letter features. Compare absorbed vs. non-absorbed F1.

tasks.name: Full: Sparse Probing (Layer 16, 16K + 65K)
tasks.description: Train k-sparse probes on layer 16 first-letter features. Compare absorbed vs. non-absorbed F1.

tasks.name: Full: Cross-Layer Correlation Analysis
tasks.description: Aggregate data across layers 8, 12, 16 and both dictionary sizes. Compute correlations, fit models, test H3 (consistency across configurations). Include power analysis.

visualizations.description: Absorption vs. steering success across all layers/sizes
Absorption vs. probing F1 degradation across all layers/sizes
Correlation strength by layer and dictionary size

tasks.name: Validation: Pythia-160M Cross-Model Check
tasks.description: Replicate absorption detection + steering + probing on Pythia-160M layer 8, 32K dict. Validate that findings generalize across model families.

visualizations.description: Pythia validation: absorption vs. steering success

tasks.name: Ablation: Steering Strength Dose-Response
tasks.description: Vary steering strength [1, 2, 5, 10, 20] for a subset of features. Measure dose-response curve to understand how steering strength interacts with absorption.

visualizations.description: Steering success vs. strength for high/medium/low absorption features

tasks.name: Ablation: Random Feature Baseline Analysis
tasks.description: Systematically analyze random feature steering baseline. Test 5 sets of 26 random features each to estimate variance of random steering effects.

visualizations.description: Distribution of random feature steering success rates
